name: New York City
title: Current Local Time in New York, NY — Online Clock
description: What time is it in New York? Get the current local time, date, and timezone for New York City. Free online world clock.
content: New York City, the 'City That Never Sleeps', is the most populous city in the United States. Located at the intersection of the Hudson River and the Atlantic Ocean, its time is governed by Eastern Standard Time (EST) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) depending on the season.

name: London
title: Current Local Time in London, UK — Online World Clock
description: Get the exact local time in London, United Kingdom. See current date, timezone, and sunrise/sunset for London.
content: London is the capital and largest city of England and the United Kingdom. Its time is based on Greenwich Mean Time (GMT) and adopts British Summer Time (BST) during the summer months.

name: Tokyo
title: Current Local Time in Tokyo, Japan — World Clock Online
description: What time is it in Tokyo? Get the current local time, date, and timezone for Japan's capital city.
content: Tokyo, Japan's busy capital, mixes the ultramodern and the traditional. Tokyo Standard Time is 9 hours ahead of UTC and does not observe daylight savings.

name: Sydney
title: Current Local Time in Sydney, Australia
description: What time is it in Sydney? Get the current local time, date, and timezone for Sydney, Australia.
content: Sydney is the state capital of New South Wales and the most populous city in Australia. Its time is Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST) or Australian Eastern Daylight Time (AEDT).

name: Dubai
title: Current Local Time in Dubai, UAE
description: Get the exact local time in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Current date, timezone, and weather information.
content: Dubai is a city and emirate in the United Arab Emirates known for luxury shopping, ultramodern architecture, and a lively nightlife scene. Dubai uses Gulf Standard Time (GST).

name: Paris
title: Current Local Time in Paris, France — Online Clock
description: What time is it in Paris? Get the local time, date, and sunny/sunset for the 'City of Lights'.
content: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France. Known for its art, fashion, gastronomy, and culture, it uses Central European Time (CET).

name: Hong Kong
title: Local Time in Hong Kong — World Clock Online
description: Exact current time in Hong Kong city, date, and weather info.
content: Hong Kong is a city and special administrative region of China. It uses Hong Kong Time (HKT) and does not observe daylight saving.

name: Singapore
title: Current Local Time in Singapore — Online Clock
description: The exact current time in Singapore. Free online world clock with sunrise/sunset and weather.
content: Singapore is a sovereign island country and city-state in maritime Southeast Asia. It uses Singapore Standard Time (SGT).

name: Mumbai
title: Current Local Time in Mumbai, India
description: Current time in Mumbai, India's financial capital. Get date, time, and weather.
content: Mumbai, formerly Bombay, is India's largest city and financial hub. It uses Indian Standard Time (IST) which is UTC +5:30.
